message:
fix(serve): add nil check in handleSessionAgents for defensive programming

The handleSessionAgents function accesses s.stateStore without checking
if it's nil first. While currently it's only called from handleSession
which does perform the check, this is a defensive programming fix to
prevent potential nil pointer panics if the function is called from
other contexts in the future.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
